channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ted Cruz endorses Alan Wilson as South Carolina GOP runoff nears
item.description: U.S. Senator Ted Cruz has endorsed South Carolina Attorney General Alan Wilson in the state's competitive Republican gubernatorial runoff, adding another high-profile backer.

item.title: Trump thanks Cohen for supporting anti-weaponization fund
item.description: President Donald Trump publicly thanked his former attorney and longtime critic Michael Cohen after Cohen unexpectedly voiced support for the initiative.

item.title: Trump bet tariffs would bring back American factory jobs. New report says it didn't work
item.description: A new report claims Trump's Liberation Day tariffs suppressed hiring by up to 1 million jobs and cost American families roughly $1,000 more in 2025.

item.title: Trump heads to G7 with Iran deal momentum, trade fights waiting
item.description: Trump joins G7 summit with world leaders to discuss trade, artificial intelligence, China dependency, and NATO amid America First tariff tensions.
